basic_details.job_title: PGIMER Project Scientist III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER)
basic_details.short_information: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) Project Scientist III (Non Medical) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website pgimer.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the PGIMER Project Scientist III (Non Medical) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: Please refer to the official notification. Age Relaxation: Relaxation of five years for SC, ST, OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctoral degree in Science or Master’s Degree (Engg or Technology) with seven years experience in R&D
qualification.details: Doctoral degree in Science or Master’s Degree (Engg or Technology) AND Seven years’ experience in R&D in Industrial and Academic Institutions, or S&T organizations. Essential: Doctoral or Master’s degree should be in a Life Sciences branch. Authorship of at least one systematic review. Desired: Experience with GRADE methodology, or economic analysis, or evidence-based guidelines.

salary_details.details: Rs. 78000 Per Month + HRA, as admissible

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PGIMER Project Scientist III (Non Medical) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PGIMER Project Scientist III (Non Medical) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGIMER Project Scientist III (Non Medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 13th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Scientist III (Non Medical) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 78,000 per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as admissible.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications for the Project Scientist III (Non Medical) position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Doctoral degree in Science or a Master’s Degree in Engineering or Technology with at least seven years of R&D experience. The degree should be in a Life Sciences branch.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Project Scientist III (Non Medical) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Scientist III (Non Medical) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Scientist III (Non Medical) position in this recruitment drive by PGIMER.

faq.question: Q7. How should candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates are required to apply via email. They need to send their complete application along with all necessary documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Does PGIMER offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, PGIMER offers age relaxation. A relaxation of five years is provided for candidates belonging to SC, ST, and OBC categories.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Scientist III (Non Medical) is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
